trivia_bullets.text: Skyknight Legionnaire is a Boros Legion card from Guilds of Ravnica (October 2018), carrying a Boros watermark. Seven total printings: Ravnica: City of Guilds (2005, Jim Murray), Magic Online Promos (Jim Murray), Gatecrash (2013, Anthony Palumbo), Modern Masters 2017 (Jim Murray), Guilds of Ravnica (2018, Chase Stone), Ravnica Remastered (2024, Jim Murray). Three different artists across its run.

Flavor text: 'Squadrons of skyknights are available for deployment around the clock, capable of reaching any district in the city within minutes.' Positions Boros skyknights as Ravnica's rapid-response aerial law enforcement -- air support, not individual heroic cavalry.

Flying + haste on a 2/2 for 3 mana ({1}{R}{W}) is the textbook Boros aggro profile: immediate threat, evasion, can't be easily ground-blocked. Pauper-legal since first 2005 printing. EDHREC rank 15,305 -- modest Commander adoption as a reliable curve-filler.

Community sentiment: MTGSalvation archives include a Standard discussion thread circa 2008 evaluating Skyknight Legionnaire for aggressive Boros lists of that era. Persistent reprinting across 19 years and five sets reflects Wizards' use of it as a Boros flagship common. Community treats it as a reliable role-player -- consistency, not power spike.

related_cards.name: Lightning Helix
related_cards.note: Iconic Boros spell from original Ravnica; pairs with Skyknight in aggressive strategies

related_cards.name: Tajic, Legion's Edge
related_cards.note: Boros legendary from same set; leads the Boros guild in the GRN story

related_cards.name: Aurelia, the Warleader
related_cards.note: Boros guildmaster who commands the skyknights; lore anchor for the corps the Legionnaire belongs to
